instruction: Navigate to /members on RESPONDER machine. Verify: 1. Same members visible (cross-team dedup works) 2. RESPONDER sees "You" badge on their own card (not commander's) 3. Commander's card shows online status (should be connected via Syncthing) 4. Stats match: same total member count as commander sees Take a screenshot.

expect.description: Responder sees same members, 'You' badge on self, commander online
